nasb.text: and the priest shall take holy water in an earthenware vessel; and he shall take some of the dust that is on the floor of the tabernacle and put it into the water.

esv.text: And the priest shall take holy water in an earthenware vessel and take some of the dust that is on the floor of the tabernacle and put it into the water.

cnv.text: 祭司要把聖水盛在瓦器裡，又從帳幕的地面取些塵土，撒在水中。

ccb.text: 用陶器盛一些圣水，从圣幕的地上取一些尘土撒在水中，
